title: Tool Of Many
body:
# Tool Of Many!
**In the deepest darkest pits of hell...There was a Story about..**

## ⚒️ NEW TOOLS!!
actually old tools, just from material that u dont use before.

From this moment (i mean - when u installed the mod and start a world with it)
U CAN CRAFT THINGS FROM OTHER MATERIALS!!!!!!!!!!1!!
Isnt it's cool? I thinks it's cool!


## So...
Get ur old pickaxe - and **REPLACE IT WITH A NEW - COOL ONE!**



# NOTE

NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT.

NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
